# Disease Diagnosis Simulation Using Machine Learning

## Project Overview

This project demonstrates how Machine Learning can be applied to disease diagnosis using the Breast Cancer Wisconsin Dataset from Scikit-Learn.

## Technologies Used

- Python 3
- Pandas
- Scikit-Learn
- Matplotlib
- Seaborn

## Model Accuracy

Accuracy: 97.37%

## Installation

```bash
git clone https://github.com/Chirunga-Chiro/disease-diagnosis.git
navigate to your working directory
pip install -r requirements.txt
```

## Author
